title.description: App din a wɔda header no so. App a ɛboa ma wuhu aduane a wɔyɛ wɔ wiase mfinimfini.

subtitle.text: Hu aduane a ɛfiri wiase mfinimfini
subtitle.description: Tagline a ɛda app din ase wɔ header no mu.

heroTitle.description: Titiriw asɛm a ɛda home page hero fa no so.

heroSubtitle.text: Hwɛ aduane a ɛyɛ nokware fi wiase mfinimfini aduane fie mu
heroSubtitle.description: Subtitle asɛm a ɛda hero titiriw no ase wɔ home page no so.

featuredTitle.description: Fael a ɛda nnuane krataa no atifi wɔ grid no so.

cookingTime.description: Bere a wode yɛ aduane no kyerɛ wɔ nnuane krataa so. {minutes} yɛ bere a ɛda ho no.

difficulty.description: Label a ɛda nnuane krataa so ansa na wɔbɛka ɔhaw no ho.

easy.description: Nyaatwom a ɛkyerɛ sɛ aduane no yɛ mmerɛ.

medium.description: Nyaatwom a ɛkyerɛ sɛ aduane no yɛ mfinimfini wɔ ɔhaw mu.

hard.description: Nyaatwom a ɛkyerɛ sɛ aduane no yɛ den.

ramenDescription.text: Nnuane a wɔde pork bone broth a ɛyɛ dɛ paa, chashu a ɛyɛ tender, kosua a wɔaboa mu, ne noodles foforo.

margheritaDescription.text: Neapolitan pizza a ɛyɛ klasik, a wɔde San Marzano tomati, mozzarella foforo, ne basil.

tacosName.description: Tacos al Pastor aduane no din.

tacosDescription.text: Pork tacos a wɔde marinade, pineapple, cilantro, ne onion gu so wɔ corn tortillas so.
tacosDescription.description: Tacos al Pastor aduane no nkyerɛase.

butterChickenDescription.text: Akokɔ a ɛyɛ tender wɔ tomato ne butter sauce a ɛyɛ creamy mu, a wɔde nnuane a ɛwɔ hɔ.

padThaiDescription.text: Rice noodles a wɔakɔtɔ mu ne shrimp, tofu, peanuts, ne tamarind sauce.

crepesDescription.text: Crepes a ɛyɛ hare na ɛyɛ fɛfɛɛfɛ a wɔde Nutella, strawberries foforo, ne whipped cream hyɛ mu.

label.description: Kasa a wɔde bɛsesaa kasa no wɔ header no mu.

en.description: Borɔfo kasa a wɔde yɛ locale switcher no mu.

ja.description: Japan kasa a wɔde yɛ locale switcher no mu.
